message:
core: implement table-backed DML pipeline (bd-202x)

Extend Connection to support CREATE TABLE, INSERT, SELECT, UPDATE, and
DELETE through the VDBE codegen/engine. Connection now holds RefCell<MemDatabase>
and RefCell<Vec<TableSchema>> for in-memory table state.

Key changes:
- Scan-based codegen for UPDATE (Rewind/Next) and DELETE (Last/Prev)
- WHERE filter evaluation in full-scan SELECT, UPDATE, DELETE
- DELETE uses reverse iteration to avoid index-shift during Vec removal
- Fix glossary.rs duplicate impl blocks from concurrent agent

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
